hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null || echo ''); case "$cmd" in *'git push'*' master '*|*'git push'*' main '*|*'git push'*' develop '*|*'git push'*':master'*|*'git push'*':main'*|*'git push'*':develop'*) echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Push в master/main/develop запрещён. Используй feature/MBL-<N> или hotfix/MBL-<N> и Merge Request."}' ;; esac
